task_description: Example ACB for testing the VS Code extension

intent_groups.title: Add user authentication middleware
intent_groups.description: Implements JWT-based authentication middleware that validates tokens on protected routes.
intent_groups.rationale: The API needs auth before exposing user data endpoints.

annotations.content: Used RS256 algorithm for JWT verification to support key rotation.

intent_groups.title: Add rate limiting to API endpoints
intent_groups.description: Adds sliding window rate limiting using Redis to prevent API abuse.
intent_groups.rationale: Production traffic analysis showed potential for abuse on public endpoints.

annotations.content: Redis connection pooling strategy needs review — currently using default pool size.

intent_groups.title: Refactor error handling
intent_groups.description: Centralizes error handling into a single middleware with structured error responses.
intent_groups.rationale: Error handling was inconsistent across routes, making debugging difficult.

open_questions.question: Should rate limiting apply to authenticated admin endpoints?
open_questions.context: Currently rate limiting is applied uniformly. Admin endpoints might need different limits.

negative_space.detail: Auth middleware reads from existing user table — no schema changes needed.
Session-based auth is planned for phase 2; this PR only implements stateless JWT.
